title: Stone Stove
description: A simle resource pack for the Farmer's Delight modification changes stove from bricks to stone.
body:
# Stone Stove

A simle resource pack for the Farmer's Delight modification changes stove from bricks to stone.

## Renders

![stove_comparation](https://github.com/Konsyliarz42/stone-stove/raw/master/render2.png) \
*Comparation with orginal stove.*

## Suported mod versions

This resource pack is supported for:

- [Farmer's Delight]
- [Farmer's Delight Fabric]
- [Farmer's Delight Refabricated]

[Farmer's Delight]: https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight
[Farmer's Delight Fabric]: https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-fabric
[Farmer's Delight Refabricated]: https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated
